message:
feat(web): add Cookie and CookieJar extractors with header parsing

Implement cookie extraction for the web framework:

- Cookie: extracts the raw Cookie request header as a string, returns
  400 Bad Request if the header is missing
- CookieJar: parses the Cookie header into a HashMap<String, String>
  with get(), contains(), len(), is_empty(), and iter() accessors.
  Returns an empty jar (not an error) when the Cookie header is absent.
- parse_cookie_header(): splits semicolon-delimited cookie pairs,
  handles whitespace trimming and optional value cookies
- Re-export Cookie and CookieJar from web module
- Comprehensive tests: single/multiple cookies, no-value cookies,
  whitespace handling, missing header behavior, jar iteration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
